use_codes.desc: INCREASE PAIN-FREE LIGHT EXPOSURE IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH A HISTORY OF PHOTOTOXIC REACTIONS FROM ERYTHROPOIETIC PROTOPORPHYRIA (EPP)

indications.text:
SCENESSE® is indicated to increase pain free light exposure in adult patients with a history of phototoxic reactions from
erythropoietic protoporphyria (EPP).
